summary: LiveKit WebRTC is now FULLY CONFIGURED with real API keys. All backend APIs return livekit_configured: true. Control Panel no longer shows the yellow warning banner. Token generation creates real JWT tokens (not mock). All features working correctly.
passed_tests: API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} returns livekit_configured: true (200)
API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{event_id} returns livekit_configured: true for different events (200)
API: GET /api/livekit/stream-status/{invalid_id} returns 404
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-creator requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-creator returns real JWT token (not mock) with LiveKit cloud URL (200)
API: POST /api/livekit/join-as-viewer requires authentication (401)
API: POST /api/livekit/end-stream/{event_id} requires authentication (401)
API: GET /api/events returns events list (200)
API: GET /api/events/{event_id} returns event details (200)
API: POST /api/admin/login works with admin@showmelive.com / admin123 (200)
API: GET /api/admin/dashboard requires admin authentication (401)
API: GET /api/admin/dashboard returns platform statistics (200)
API: GET /api/plaid/status returns configured=false (Plaid still needs API keys)
Frontend: Homepage loads for guests with events carousel
Frontend: Event detail page loads with event info and ticket purchase
Frontend: Admin panel login works and shows dashboard with all tabs
Frontend: Control Panel loads WITHOUT LiveKit warning banner
Frontend: Control Panel Start Stream button is visible and clickable
Frontend: Control Panel shows PRO badge, LIVE indicator, viewers count
Frontend: Control Panel shows all camera controls (Cam 1-5), mic volume, speaker, video transitions
seed_data_creation: Used existing test creator user and event from iteration 7
context_for_next_testing_agent: LiveKit WebRTC is now FULLY CONFIGURED with real API keys (LIVEKIT_URL=wss://showmelive-4y2wqa4p.livekit.cloud, LIVEKIT_API_KEY=APIKGoo5WNPe6u2, LIVEKIT_API_SECRET configured). The stream-status endpoint returns livekit_configured: true. Token generation creates real JWT tokens. Control Panel no longer shows the warning banner. Plaid bank linking still needs API keys (returns configured=false).
